title: Reports: Kevin Huerter plans to re-sign with Pistons
summary: NBA.com, citing ESPN's Shams Charania and The Athletic, reports Kevin Huerter plans to return to Detroit on a three-year, $27 million deal.

title: Spurs sign Julian Champagnie to new 3-year deal
summary: San Antonio announced a new multiyear contract for Julian Champagnie after declining his team option and negotiating a fresh deal.

title: Reports: Blazers add Ja Morant in trade with Grizzlies
summary: NBA.com, citing ESPN, reports Portland is acquiring Ja Morant from Memphis for Jerami Grant and Kris Murray.

title: Reports: Landry Shamet, Knicks agree to 4-year deal
summary: NBA.com, citing ESPN's Shams Charania and The Athletic, reports Landry Shamet intends to return to the Knicks on a four-year, $24 million deal.

title: Report: Cavs agree to 1-year deal with Thomas Bryant
summary: NBA.com, citing ESPN's Shams Charania, reports veteran center Thomas Bryant intends to return to Cleveland on a one-year contract.

title: Reports: Hawks add Devin Carter in trade with Kings
summary: NBA.com, citing ESPN and Jake Fischer, reports Atlanta is acquiring Devin Carter and a future second-round pick from Sacramento.

title: Reports: Andrew Wiggins, Heat agree to extension
summary: NBA.com, citing multiple reports, says Andrew Wiggins plans to opt in for 2026-27 and sign a two-year extension with Miami.

title: Reports: Hornets send Miles Bridges to Suns for Grayson Allen
summary: NBA.com, citing multiple reports, says Charlotte is sending Miles Bridges and picks to Phoenix for Grayson Allen, Royce O'Neale and a future first-round pick.

title: Reports: Celtics re-sign Ron Harper Jr. to long-term extension
summary: NBA.com, citing ESPN's Shams Charania, reports Boston is bringing back Ron Harper Jr. on a three-year, $9 million contract.

title: Report: Hornets, Coby White agree to 3-year deal
summary: NBA.com, citing ESPN's Shams Charania, reports Charlotte and guard Coby White have agreed to a three-year, $74 million deal.

title: Reports: Grizzlies trade for Isaiah Stewart, sending picks to Pistons
summary: NBA.com, citing ESPN and Jake Fischer, reports Memphis is acquiring Isaiah Stewart from Detroit for three future second-round picks.
